items.title: INVESTOR ACTION NOTICE: Moore Law PLLC Encourages Investors in Super Micro Computer, Inc. to Contact Law Firm
items.summary: Moore Law PLLC is investigating Super Micro Computer, Inc. (SMCI) for potential securities fraud following multiple disclosures in August-September 2024. The company revealed margin pressures on August 6, faced Hindenburg Research allegations of fraudulent revenue recognition and accounting irregularities on August 27, announced delayed 10-K filing on August 28, and faced a DOJ investigation announcement on September 26. These events triggered significant stock price declines totaling over 34% across the disclosure period.
